summary: Frontend testing for POS page task menu functionality completed. All 12 features tested and verified: Search input, Add Product button, all 8 task menu items with correct dialogs/navigation, product shortcuts (10 boxes) fitting on single page, and return mode badge display.

minor.issue: 403 errors in console logs during page load - likely due to session/permission handling, but does not affect core functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All task menu items have correct data-testid attributes (task-{id})
Search input and Add Product button correctly positioned above task menu
Product shortcuts reduced from 20 to 10 - all fit on single page without scrolling
Return mode toggle shows animated badge in header with destructive styling
All dialogs (products, customers, note, cash, history) open correctly on task click
Reports navigation correctly uses React Router navigate()
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Note: Products dialog shows empty list (no products in database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS page task menu fully functional. All tests passed: 1) Search input with data-testid='pos-search-input' present, 2) Add Product button with data-testid='add-product-btn' present, 3) Task 'articles' opens products selection dialog, 4) Task 'customers' opens customers selection dialog, 5) Task 'note' opens note dialog, 6) Task 'return' toggles return mode with animated badge 'وضع الإرجاع' visible in header, 7) Task 'deposit' opens cash deposit dialog, 8) Task 'withdraw' opens cash withdraw dialog, 9) Task 'reports' navigates to /reports page, 10) Task 'history' opens sales history dialog, 11) 10 product shortcuts present with data-testid='shortcut-{0-9}', 12) All shortcuts visible on page without scrolling (viewport height 1080px, all 10 shortcuts within view).

search_input.details: Search input field present above task menu in left sidebar

add_product_button.details: Add Product button (إضافة منتج) present, opens products dialog on click

task_articles.details: Opens products selection dialog with search and family filter

task_note.details: Opens note dialog with textarea for adding sale notes

task_return.details: Toggles return mode, shows animated destructive badge 'وضع الإرجاع' in header, task button gets destructive styling

task_deposit.details: Opens cash deposit dialog with amount and note fields

task_withdraw.details: Opens cash withdraw dialog with amount and note fields

task_reports.details: Navigates to /reports page using React Router

task_history.details: Opens sales history dialog showing recent sales

product_shortcuts.details: 10 product shortcut boxes in right sidebar, all visible without scrolling

shortcuts_single_page.details: All 10 shortcuts fit within 1080px viewport height
